overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character running through a vibrant forest with purple flowering trees, transitioning from a dark wooded area to a sunlit coastal cliff overlooking the ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest path with hanging purple flowering vines

events.description: location text 'SENJO GORGE' appears in bottom right corner
emerging from dark forest shadows into brighter sunlit area

agents.ego_description: samurai character running along narrow forest path beneath dense canopy

entered.detail: tall trees forming dense overhead cover with limited sky visibility
hanging purple wisteria blossoms draping from tree branches
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest
large rocks covered in green moss scattered along path

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a dense, shadowy forest with limited sky visibility. Purple flowering vines hang from the trees overhead, and the ground is covered with a mix of dirt and fallen leaves. The location text 'SENJO GORGE' appears on screen as the character moves deeper into the woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grove with massive purple flowering trees and petal-covered ground

events.description: character runs through open meadow with scattered large trees

agents.ego_description: running through sunlit grove with purple petals covering the ground, navigating around trees

entered.detail: massive trees with cascading purple blossoms dominating the landscape
ground completely carpeted in fallen purple flower petals
rocky mountain formations visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide, sunlit grove filled with massive trees covered in vibrant purple blossoms. The ground is completely carpeted in fallen purple petals, creating a vivid contrast with the green grass. Large boulders are scattered throughout the area as the character continues running forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff approach with ocean view opening up

events.description: ocean and coastline come into view as character approaches cliff edge
sun becomes visible over the ocean creating bright lens flare

agents.ego_description: running toward cliff edge with ocean visible ahead, sun glare increasing

entered.detail: steep cliff dropping down to the ocean water
blue ocean with white surf visible in the distance
bright sun low over the water creating lens flare effects

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the grove and approaches a coastal cliff. The ocean becomes visible in the distance, with the sun low on the horizon creating a bright glare. The dense purple trees give way to sparser vegetation as the cliff edge approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal cliff overlooking ocean with waterfall

events.description: character slows and stops at cliff edge to overlook the ocean and shoreline

agents.ego_description: stopping at cliff edge to look down at rocky shoreline, ocean waves, and waterfall

entered.detail: jagged dark rocks along the shoreline with waves crashing
water cascading down pink-stained rock face to the ocean

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the cliff edge and stops to overlook the ocean. Below, waves crash against the rocky shoreline, and a waterfall cascades down the cliff face. The sun shines brightly over the water, illuminating the mist rising from the surf.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shadowy, enclosed forest into a brilliant, sun-drenched coastal vista. It begins with the character running through the dense, dim woods of Senjo Gorge, where purple flowering vines hang overhead and the ground is a mix of dirt and fallen leaves. As the canopy opens, the scene shifts into a wide, luminous grove where massive trees burst with vibrant purple blossoms and the ground becomes a vivid carpet of fallen petals and scattered boulders. The camera then follows the character as the dense purple foliage gives way to sparser vegetation, gradually revealing the ocean and a low, glaring sun on the horizon. Finally, the movement culminates at the edge of a steep cliff, overlooking crashing waves and a cascading waterfall illuminated by bright sunlight and rising mist.
